title: cyclobalanopsis gambleana
intro: Cyclobalanopsis gambleana, also known as the Korean oak or Gambel oak, is a species of evergreen tree in the family Fagaceae, native to the mountainous regions of East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and polyphenolic compounds. The health benefits of Cyclobalanopsis gambleana include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce the risk of certain types of cancer. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into tea, extracts, or capsules, and are used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
